coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 296-group, 2,413-node closure, including its six-object pipe structure collection.
validation: The authored six-way pipe layout, generated sleeves, SDF joint shell, dual-mesh smoothing, and structure toggle run in-browser. Collection Info and the instance-domain For Each zone preserve Blender's full affine transforms and direct component-join semantics. The imported six-object structure is exact at 4,968 / 4,758. Generation_0 is exact at 10,578 / 10,326 and Generation_1 is exact at 18,060 / 18,060, with all 28,638 realized hull positions bit-identical to Blender by index. A full Blender probe now also proves all 15,600 samples in the first Mesh To SDF / Volume Cube FloatGrid are bit-identical. The first residual is exclusively OpenVDB GridTransformer / Volume to Mesh resampling: Blender's first surface is 3,496 / 3,494 versus 3,470 / 3,468 in GN-VM. Its downstream second remesh is 3,308 / 3,306 versus 3,362 / 3,360, producing the final 11,162 / 8,064 versus 11,227 / 8,118 authored result. A threshold-only compensation was tested and rejected because it makes the first count exact while worsening the downstream shell. The remaining work is exact sparse FloatGrid resampling, not collection extraction, SDF evaluation, generated instances, or convex-hull construction.
